questions.query: In CO#15 for the Ave I water service relocation, what is the scope of work and who is performing it?
In J-TRACK-13A-041R00 Material I&T Request for 100-8 6-hole joint bar, what is the inspection item description, what quantity is requested, and what ASTM standard governs the material?
In DRFI-0079 for the Middletown NB Stair Foundation Rebar Interference, what is the rebar and anchor bolt conflict under spec section 05 12 00?

In MYR-002R00 Myrtle Avenue Demo Shield Drawings, what does Section 1 show for the hung shielding system, and what structural steel member sizes and connection details are specified in the enlarged section views?
In RFI-009 for Myrtle Avenue UPS Backup Requirements, what spec section 27 33 01 requirements apply and who submitted this RFI?
In GEN-044R00 List of Competent Persons, which electrical and communications staff from TC Electric are listed with their roles and contact information under spec 01 35 10?
In GEN-044R00 List of Competent Persons under spec 01 35 10, who are the listed heavy civil superintendents and project engineers from MLJ Contracting, with their roles and phone numbers?
